ddls:
CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement_agencies" (
  "lawenforcementagency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law enforcement agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the law enforcement agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of law enforcement agency (e.g., local, state, federal) */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the law enforcement agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lawenforcementagency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_type" TEXT /* Type of classification (e.g., crime, accident, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the incident location */,
  "streetaddress" TEXT /* Street address where the incident occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the incident location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., residential, commercial, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident being responded to */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the law enforcement agency responding */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Details of the law enforcement response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., patrol, SWAT, etc.) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time it took for law enforcement to respond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_responses_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES law_enforcement_agencies ("lawenforcementagency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of the update to the incident report */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident involving the suspect */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "raceethnicity" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity of the suspect */,
  "armed" TEXT /* Whether the suspect was armed */,
  "charges" TEXT /* Charges filed against the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident involving the victim */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "raceethnicity" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity of the victim */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Injuries sustained by the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the incident report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the law enforcement agency the officer belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officer_incident_responses" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id", "response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident the evidence belongs to */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., physical, witness statement, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_charges" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge */,
  "charge_description" TEXT /* Description of the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "charge_id")
)
